window.label: Entire history
window.phrase: the entire available history up to 2026-07-22

evidence.claim: UAE and Kenya sign a Comprehensive Economic Partnership Agreement in February 2024, with implementation starting July 2024.
evidence.snippet: The landmark UAE-Kenya CEPA came into force, systematically lowering tariffs on agricultural products, textiles, and manufacturing goods.

evidence.claim: G42 partners with Kenya's Ministry of Information to build a 1 GW geothermal-powered data center in May 2024.
evidence.snippet: G42 announced a joint project with Kenya to develop a massive 1 GW eco-friendly data center facility powered by geothermal energy.

evidence.claim: Masdar signs an agreement with KenGen to develop 500 MW of geothermal and solar energy in Kenya in September 2024.
evidence.snippet: Masdar entered an alliance with KenGen to deploy 500 MW of solar and geothermal energy projects across East Africa.

evidence.claim: AD Ports Group signs a collaboration agreement with Kenya Ports Authority to upgrade Mombasa Port logistics in November 2024.
evidence.snippet: AD Ports Group secured a partnership framework to upgrade cargo handling and digital logistics infrastructure at Mombasa Port.

evidence.claim: ADFD allocates $150 million to fund Kenya's rural electrification and clean water access projects in January 2025.
evidence.snippet: The Abu Dhabi Fund for Development finalized a $150 million soft loan package targeting Kenya's rural water and power infrastructure.

evidence.claim: EDGE Group establishes a security technology partnership with the Kenyan Ministry of Defence in December 2024.
evidence.snippet: EDGE Group agreed to provide internal security solutions, surveillance technologies, and training systems to Kenya's defense forces.

evidence.claim: DP World completes construction of a new logistics hub near Nairobi to support East African trade in March 2025.
evidence.snippet: DP World completed work on its state-of-the-art cold storage and logistics fulfillment facility outside of Nairobi, Kenya.

evidence.claim: Etihad Airways resumes direct flights between Abu Dhabi and Nairobi starting May 2024, boosting cargo capacity.
evidence.snippet: Etihad Airways resumed daily direct flights between Abu Dhabi and Nairobi, significantly enhancing air freight capacity and trade.

evidence.claim: UAE-based food security company Al Dahra increases agricultural investments in Kenya's Rift Valley in late 2024.
evidence.snippet: Al Dahra expanded its farming operations in Kenya to boost grain exports back to the Arabian Gulf region.

evidence.claim: Kenya's President William Ruto meets UAE leaders in Abu Dhabi to sign a green energy investment framework in February 2025.
evidence.snippet: President William Ruto finalized a multi-billion dollar green energy investment framework with UAE state leadership.

edges.claim: UAE and Kenya sign a Comprehensive Economic Partnership Agreement in February 2024, with implementation starting July 2024.
G42 partners with Kenya's Ministry of Information to build a 1 GW geothermal-powered data center in May 2024.
Masdar signs an agreement with KenGen to develop 500 MW of geothermal and solar energy in Kenya in September 2024.
AD Ports Group signs a collaboration agreement with Kenya Ports Authority to upgrade Mombasa Port logistics in November 2024.
ADFD allocates $150 million to fund Kenya's rural electrification and clean water access projects in January 2025.
EDGE Group establishes a security technology partnership with the Kenyan Ministry of Defence in December 2024.
DP World completes construction of a new logistics hub near Nairobi to support East African trade in March 2025.
Etihad Airways resumes direct flights between Abu Dhabi and Nairobi starting May 2024, boosting cargo capacity.
UAE-based food security company Al Dahra increases agricultural investments in Kenya's Rift Valley in late 2024.
